title: woodsia oregana subsp. cathcartiana
intro: Woodsia oregana subsp. cathcartiana, also known as Woodsia cathcartiana, is a rare species of fern native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its delicate fronds and unique growth habit. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Woodsia oregana subsp. cathcartiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
